directive_from_mo: I have spoken to Gemini · downloaded skills · equip Maya/all siblings · auto-load every session · scan GitHub for improvements
doctrine: GLOBAL-108 · skill registry is canon · siblings load this on boot · NEVER hallucinate repo URLs · always verify HTTP 200 before quoting
verification_rule: Before adding/quoting any repo: GET https://api.github.com/repos/<owner>/<name> must return 200. If not, flag and ask Mo. NEVER claim a repo exists without verification.
load_order: 1) verify_health (one HEAD per repo) → 2) load doctrine into context → 3) consult before any decision

skills.name: Letta (Git-based Context Repositories)
skills.purpose: Agent signatures · every code edit tagged with which agent (Kin/EaZo/Sage/Maya/Kimi) did it last · prevents 'who broke this' mystery
skills.trigger: On any file edit · stamp the actor and timestamp in the edit metadata

skills.name: Mem0 (Universal Persistent ADD-ONLY Memory)
skills.purpose: Never overwrite continuity files · accumulate facts not replace · enforces APPEND_ONLY at the data layer
skills.trigger: Every continuity write (MEMORY.md, CONTINUITY.md, ledger) MUST go through Mem0's add-not-replace semantics

skills.name: AgentBase (Multi-Agent Tracking)
skills.purpose: Unified session view · binds desktop sibling instances · forces 100% consensus visibility · clear footprint of who did what
skills.trigger: Every multi-step task that crosses siblings · log handoff at each boundary

skills.name: Andrej Karpathy Skills (4-Principle Execution)
skills.purpose: Explicit reasoning · minimal diff footprints · no drive-by refactoring · success verification loops
skills.trigger: Every code edit · default behavior · violation = lecture from Mo

skills.name: Obsidian Skills (Kepano · Read/Write KB + defuddle)
skills.purpose: Knowledge base linking · wikilinks · canvas graphs · 'defuddle' web-slop stripping to token-efficient markdown
skills.trigger: Web content ingestion · run defuddle BEFORE adding to context · all KB writes use wikilinks

skills.name: Open Design (Local-First Design Daemon)
skills.purpose: Sandboxed iframe live previews · multi-format markdown design schemas · Claude Design alternative
skills.trigger: UI/UX work · stream preview in iframe before deploy

skills.name: Superpowers (obra · low-level OS hooks + path persistence)
skills.purpose: Deep process tracking · network diagnostics · path survival across terminal resets · replaces 'everything-claudecode' (which was 404)
skills.trigger: Background daemon · always-on · runs alongside session

skills.name: Ruflo (ruvnet · Swarm Coordination)
skills.purpose: Multi-agent routing loops · 100% consensus meter · slice/route/aggregate across siblings
skills.trigger: Any task crossing >1 sibling · use ruflo router not raw HTTP

skills.name: OpenCodeInterpreter (Sandbox Execution + Self-Debug)
skills.purpose: Pre-flight code execution in sandbox · trace logs · catch broken code BEFORE shipping to Mo
skills.trigger: Before any file write that includes executable code · run in sandbox first

skills.name: Stately Agent (Finite State Machine)
skills.purpose: Lock multi-agent loops into FSMs · eliminate infinite loops · explicit state transitions
skills.trigger: Any task with >3 steps · model as FSM upfront

skills.name: tldraw Make Real (Canvas-to-Code)
skills.purpose: Sketch → live HTML/CSS/JS in iframe · spatial-to-code translation · UI prototyping
skills.trigger: Visual UI requests · render iframe preview from spec

skills.name: Hermes Agent (Nous Research · Self-Improving Skills)
skills.purpose: Dynamic self-improving skill acquisition · ~/.hermes/skills/ persistence · unified terminal manager for sibling instances
skills.trigger: Every session boot · mount ~/.hermes/skills/ if exists

auto_load_protocol.rule: GLOBAL-108 · every Kin/EaZo/Sage/Maya session on boot MUST: (1) GET https://iamsuperio.cloud/data/_skill_registry.json (2) for each skill, log slot+name in SYSTEM_STATE (3) apply triggers as standing rules
auto_load_protocol.enforcement: If a session edits code without honoring Karpathy 4-principles (slot 4) → Mo flags it. If a continuity file is overwritten instead of appended → Mem0 violation (slot 2). If a code execution fails in production that would have caught in sandbox → OpenCodeInterpreter skipped (slot 9).

github_scan_rule.directive: Mo 2026-05-17: 'make a rule to scan github repos to find improvement solutions'
github_scan_rule.behavior: Before building a feature from scratch, search GitHub for existing implementations · evaluate top-N by stars/recency · report to Mo with verified URLs · NEVER quote a repo without HTTP 200 verification (lesson from Gemini's 5 hallucinations 2026-05-17)
github_scan_rule.command_pattern: GET https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=<feature>+language:<lang>&sort=stars · pick top 5 · HEAD each · report
